title: Prevent Duplications
excerpt: Provide a way to avoid duplicates e.g. via unique column: Name, email, ID number

posts.author: beacorona (Beatriz)
posts.cookedHtml: Provide a way to avoid duplicates e.g. via unique column: Name, email, ID number

posts.author: tonydee (Antonis Despotakis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @beacorona , have you had any feedback or workaround on how to achieve unique columns functionality?
This is a key feature to avoid item duplications.

Thank you,
Antonis

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @tonydee and @beacorona,
You might be interested in the Duplicates and Uniques app. It does exactly what you are looking for and more. If you have any questions, you can always write to support@kolaai.com

posts.author: tonydee (Antonis Despotakis)
posts.cookedHtml:
@kolaai I have watched your demos which allow users to find unique and duplicate items.
However I would like to be able to constraing duplicate items from being entered in the first place inside a board. Let me know if this is something that can be achieved through your app.

Thank you

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @tonydee, you can achieve this by creating a template which deletes duplicate items. Once the item is added and it is a duplicate, it will automatically be deleted, thereby keeping your board fresh and clean

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @beacorona @tonydee

Just in case you’re still looking for an easy and effective way to prevent duplicate items in your Monday boards, I wrote a full article on how to achieve this with just two automations.

How to automatically prevent having duplicate items in your board

Hope this helps! Feel free to reach out to us if you need any help!

Send an email
